tool.name: MAGs-visualization sample-heatmap
tool.command:
mags-visualization sample-heatmap --coverm '$coverm' --gtdb '$gtdb' --tax_level '$tax_level' --format '$format' --max_col '$max_col'
#if $metadata_cond.use_metadata == "yes" --metadata '$metadata_cond.metadata' --meta_bin_width '$metadata_cond.meta_bin_width' #if $metadata_cond.meta_cols --meta_cols #for $mc in $metadata_cond.meta_cols '$mc' #end for #end if #end if
$no_log
--top_bar_height '$layout.top_bar_height' --hspace '$layout.hspace' --heatmap_width '$layout.heatmap_width' --spacer_legend '$layout.spacer_legend' --spacer_meta '$layout.spacer_meta' --spacer_heatmap '$layout.spacer_heatmap' --legend '$layout.legend' --meta_bar_add '$layout.meta_bar_add' --top_bar_spacer '$layout.top_bar_spacer'
-o outputs && mv outputs/heatmap_*.${format} outputs/final_plot.png

param.label: CoverM table
param.help: CoverM abundance matrix with MAG/bin IDs in the first column and samples in the remaining columns. Use the unmodified CoverM output; sample column names are also used to match optional metadata.

param.label: GTDB annotation table
param.help: GTDB-Tk summary table used to assign each MAG/bin to the selected taxonomic level. The tool uses the user_genome and classification columns from the unmodified GTDB-Tk output.

param.name: use_metadata
param.label: Add metadata annotation?
param.help: Add sample metadata as annotation bars above the heatmap. Metadata sample IDs must match the CoverM sample columns.

param.name: metadata
param.label: Metadata table
param.help: Sample-level metadata table. The first column should contain sample identifiers matching the CoverM sample columns; selected metadata columns are shown as annotation bars.

param.name: meta_cols
param.label: Metadata columns
param.help: Select one or more columns to display as annotation bars above the heatmap. Use categorical columns directly; numeric columns are binned using the bin width below.

param.name: meta_bin_width
param.label: Bin width for numeric metadata
param.help: Width of bins used to group numeric metadata values into discrete categories for coloring. For example, a bin with of 5 groups values 0-5, 5-10, 10-15 etc. Smaller values create more categories with finer resolution; larger values group more broadly.

param.label: Taxonomic level
param.help: Taxonomic rank used to group and label MAGs in the heatmap. The rank is extracted from the GTDB-Tk classification column.

param.label: Maximum number of taxonomy labels
param.help: Maximum number of taxonomic labels to show. If more groups are present, only the most abundant labels are displayed to keep the heatmap readable.

param.label: Disable log10 scaling for the top bar plot
param.help: By default, the top bar plot is log10-scaled to make differences in MAG counts easier to compare. Enable this option to show raw counts instead.

section.name: layout
section.title: Heatmap layout options
section.help: Adjust the heatmap layout. All distances are specified in centimeters.

param.name: top_bar_height
param.label: Top bar height (cm)
param.help: Height of the top bar plot showing the number of MAGs per sample.

param.name: hspace
param.label: Vertical spacing between top bar and heatmap (cm)
param.help: Vertical distance between the top bar plot and the heatmap.

param.name: heatmap_width
param.label: Heatmap width (cm)
param.help: Width of the main heatmap panel.

param.name: spacer_legend
param.label: Spacer between legend and metadata bars (cm)
param.help: Horizontal space between the legend and optional metadata annotation bars.

param.name: spacer_meta
param.label: Spacer between metadata bars and heatmap (cm)
param.help: Horizontal space between metadata annotation bars and the heatmap.

param.name: spacer_heatmap
param.label: Spacer between heatmap and histogram (cm)
param.help: Horizontal space between the heatmap and the MAG distribution histogram.

param.name: legend
param.label: Legend width (cm)
param.help: Width reserved for the color legend.

param.name: meta_bar_add
param.label: Additional width for metadata bars (cm)
param.help: Additional width reserved for metadata annotation bars when metadata is shown.

param.name: top_bar_spacer
param.label: Spacer above top bar (cm)
param.help: Extra vertical space above the top bar plot.

tool.help:
**MAGs-visualization: sample-heatmap**
This tool generates a heatmap showing MAG detection patterns across samples based on MAG abundance estimates (CoverM) and GTDB taxonomy assignments.
The top bar plot shows the number of detected MAGs per sample. The heatmap shows MAG abundance across samples, grouped and labeled at the selected taxonomic level. Optional sample metadata columns can be added as annotation bars above the heatmap.
**Input files:**
- **CoverM abundance table**: unmodified CoverM abundance matrix. Rows are MAGs/bins and columns are samples. The first column must contain MAG/bin IDs and the remaining column names must be sample IDs.
Example header and rows from `coverm.tsv`:
``` Genome SRR24759596 SRR24759597 SRR24759598 ... SRR24759597_bin_73064 2.5199997 3.4229383 0.4999176 ... SRR24759598_bin_119213 0 0.09832106 1.7022405 ... SRR24759598_bin_132977 0 0 0.3619148 ... ```
- **GTDB-Tk annotation table**: unmodified GTDB-Tk summary table. The tool uses the `user_genome` and `classification` columns to assign taxonomy to each MAG/bin.
Example relevant columns from `gtdb.tsv`:
``` user_genome classification SRR24759597_bin_73064.fasta d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Enterobacterales;f__Enterobacteriaceae;g__Frischella;s__Frischella perrara SRR24759598_bin_119213.fasta d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Enterobacterales;f__Enterobacteriaceae;g__Gilliamella;s__Gilliamella sp945271295 SRR24759598_bin_132977.fasta d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;o__Enterobacterales;f__Enterobacteriaceae;g__Serratia;s__Serratia ureilytica ```
- **Metadata table (optional)**: sample-level metadata table. The first column should contain sample identifiers matching the CoverM sample columns. Selected metadata columns are shown as annotation bars.
Example header and rows from `metadata.tsv`:
``` Run accession Sample accession Sample alias Replicate Condition Experimental condition Infection by Nosema ceranae Chronic exposure to neonicotinoid Treatment with probiotic SRR24759600 SAMN35523847 II3 NT Replicate3 NT infection by N. ceranae then chronic exposure to 1.5 ng/mL thiamethoxam TRUE TRUE FALSE SRR24759601 SAMN35523846 II2 NT Replicate2 NT infection by N. ceranae then chronic exposure to 1.5 ng/mL thiamethoxam TRUE TRUE FALSE SRR24759604 SAMN35523841 I3 N Replicate3 N infection by N. ceranae TRUE FALSE FALSE ```
**Output:**
- Heatmap visualizing MAG abundance across samples at the selected taxonomic level
**Layout options:** All size and spacing parameters (figure width, height, spacers) are specified in **cm**.
Example output plots are available in the MAGs-visualization use cases with example configurations and parameter choices: https://github.com/usegalaxy-eu/MAGs-visualization/tree/main/use-cases
For a direct example (bee microbiome dataset): https://github.com/usegalaxy-eu/MAGs-visualization/tree/main/use-cases/bee-use-case/plots
